backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the portfolio backend, managing projects, user profiles, bio/hero/contact data with role-based access control (admin/user) via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that defines the actor state shape and initializes default portfolio data (bio, projects, contact info, user profiles) for canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—Internet Identity login/logout and authenticated inline editing—to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React components, hooks, and styles.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the full single-page portfolio layout (Navigation, Hero, About, Skills, Portfolio, Contact, Footer) in a React Query QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component that fetches bio and about text from the backend and renders inline textarea edit controls with save/cancel for authenticated owners.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section component that fetches and displays contact info (email, phone, location, GitHub) from the backend, with an inline edit form visible only to the authenticated owner.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand logo, social links (GitHub, LinkedIn, X), copyright notice with a caffeine.ai attribution, and smooth-scroll navigation links.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section displaying the developer's name and an editable subtitle (persisted via backend mutation) with authentication-gated inline editing controls and scroll-to-section buttons.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, active-section highlighting, a mobile hamburger menu, and Internet Identity login/logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/Portfolio.tsx: Portfolio section that fetches and displays projects from the backend, allowing authenticated users to add, edit, and delete projects via inline forms.
frontend/src/components/ProjectCard.tsx: Reusable card component that displays a project's title, description, and GitHub link, with optional owner-only edit and delete action buttons.
frontend/src/components/Skills.tsx: Static skills section rendering categorized skill bars with percentage levels and a tag cloud of technologies, with no backend interaction.
frontend/src/hooks/useActiveSection.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track and return the currently visible section ID from a provided list of section IDs.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing login/logout state via DFINITY's AuthClient and exposing identity, login status, and helper flags to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for reading and mutating backend data (user profile, hero section, bio, about, contact info, projects) using the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for theming (dark mode, gold accents), and adds utility classes for gold gradients and glows.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from query strings and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography/serif/mono font families, custom shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state, version, summary, and feature list for a personal portfolio website with Internet Identity authentication and inline content editing capabilities.
